name: Diabetic Semisweet Dipping Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk powder, cocoa, and paraffin wax in a food processor or blender until you have a soft powder.
2. Pour this mixture into the top of a double boiler and add water, stirring to blend thoroughly.
3. Add the liquid shortening and place over hot (not boiling) water, stirring until all wax pieces are dissolved and the mixture is thick, smooth, and creamy.
4. Remove from heat.
5. Stir in the sugar replacement and let cool slightly.
6. Dip candies according to your recipe instructions.
7. Shake off excess chocolate and place on lightly greased wax paper. Allow to cool completely.
If necessary, warm the waxed paper gently with an electric burner or clothes iron before dipping additional candies.
Store in a cool place.
